title: Add comprehensive services section based on reference websites

requirements.summary: Create a new Services page that lists all company formation and business support services offered, organized into clear categories
acceptanceCriteria: Services page displays multiple service categories with clear headings
Each service category contains a list of individual services
Services are presented in a clean, organized layout similar to reference sites
Page is accessible from main navigation

file_operations.description: Create a comprehensive Services page component that displays service categories (Company Formation, Registered Office Services, Business Support, Compliance Services) with organized service listings. Use the Section component for consistent layout. Include generated category icons from frontend/public/assets/generated/service-formation.dim_120x120.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/service-office.dim_120x120.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/service-support.dim_120x120.png, and frontend/public/assets/generated/service-compliance.dim_120x120.png. Include the hero banner from frontend/public/assets/generated/services-hero.dim_1200x400.png. Apply the forest green and charcoal color scheme from the theme.
Add a route registration for the new ServicesPage at path '/services' in the TanStack Router configuration, ensuring it uses the SiteLayout wrapper for consistent navigation and footer.

requirements.summary: Expand the services catalog to include additional formation-related services
acceptanceCriteria: Each additional service has a clear name and description
Services include key features or benefits
Pricing information is displayed where applicable
Services are organized logically within their categories

file_operations.description: Create a services catalog data structure defining all service offerings including: registered office address service, business address service, mail forwarding, director service, company secretary service, VAT registration, PAYE registration, and business bank account assistance. Each service should include name, description, category, key features/benefits, and pricing where applicable. Structure similar to packagesCatalog.ts for consistency.

Import and display the expanded services catalog from servicesCatalog.ts. Render each service with its name, description, features, and pricing in an organized card or list layout within the appropriate category section.

requirements.summary: Add detailed service pages for major service offerings that explain what each service includes, pricing tiers, and benefits
acceptanceCriteria: Each major service has its own dedicated page with comprehensive information
Pages include service descriptions, features, pricing, and call-to-action buttons
Navigation between related service pages is intuitive
Content is structured with clear headings and sections

file_operations.description: Create a detailed service page for Company Formation services. Include comprehensive descriptions of formation types (Ltd, LLP, etc.), pricing tiers, included features, benefits, and a CTA button linking to the formation wizard. Use Section component for layout consistency and apply theme colors.

Create a detailed service page for Registered Office services. Include service description, what's included, pricing options, benefits of using a registered office service, and CTA buttons. Use Section component and theme styling.

Create a detailed service page for Business Support services. Include descriptions of support offerings (secretary service, VAT/PAYE registration, bank account assistance), pricing, benefits, and CTAs. Use Section component and maintain design consistency.

Add route registrations for the three detailed service pages at paths '/services/company-formation', '/services/registered-office', and '/services/business-support' in the TanStack Router configuration, all wrapped with SiteLayout.

requirements.summary: Update the home page to feature a services overview section showcasing the most popular or core services
acceptanceCriteria: Home page includes a prominent services section
Section highlights 4-6 key services with icons or visual elements
Each service card links to its detailed service page
Section integrates seamlessly with existing home page design

file_operations.description: Add a new services overview section to the HomePage between the benefits cards and the process steps. Display 4-6 core services (Company Formation, Registered Office, Business Support, Compliance) with the generated category icons (frontend/public/assets/generated/service-formation.dim_120x120.png, service-office.dim_120x120.png, service-support.dim_120x120.png, service-compliance.dim_120x120.png), brief descriptions, and links to their respective service pages. Use the existing Section component wrapper and maintain the forest green/charcoal theme.

requirements.summary: Add a service comparison feature that allows users to compare different formation packages or service tiers side-by-side
acceptanceCriteria: Comparison table displays multiple packages/services in columns
Feature rows clearly indicate what's included in each tier
Pricing is prominently displayed for each option
Users can select a package directly from the comparison view

file_operations.description: Create a reusable ServiceComparisonTable component that displays packages or service tiers in a side-by-side comparison format. Include columns for each package/tier with pricing at the top, feature rows with checkmarks or text indicating inclusion, and selection buttons at the bottom. Style using theme colors and ensure responsive behavior for mobile views.

Import and integrate the ServiceComparisonTable component to display the three formation packages (Basic, Standard, Premium) from packagesCatalog.ts in a comparison format. Wire selection buttons to update the formation draft and navigate to the formation wizard, similar to PricingPage.tsx functionality.

requirements.summary: Enhance the navigation menu to include a Services dropdown or section that provides quick access to all service categories and popular individual services
acceptanceCriteria: Main navigation includes a Services menu item
Dropdown or mega menu displays service categories
Users can navigate directly to specific services from the menu
Menu works consistently on both desktop and mobile views

file_operations.description: Add a Services navigation item to the main navigation menu with a dropdown/submenu containing links to the main Services page and the three detailed service pages (Company Formation, Registered Office, Business Support). Ensure the dropdown works on both desktop (hover or click) and mobile (within the mobile menu). Maintain existing navigation structure and styling consistency with current menu items (Home, Pricing, How It Works, FAQ, Contact).
